headline: The Memory Shortage Has Supercharged This AI Stock That Has Jumped 293% in a Year. It Can Still Soar Higher (Hint: It's Not Micron or Sandisk)
summary: The shortage of memory chips is driving higher investments in equipment and infrastructure, which is great news for Lam Research investors.

headline: Seaport Research Affirms Lam Research Corporation (LRCX) as One of The Top Tech Stocks in Louis Navellier’s Portfolio
summary: Lam Research Corporation (NASDAQ:LRCX) is one of the top tech stocks in Louis Navellier’s portfolio. On May 5, Seaport Research analyst Jay Goldberg initiated coverage of Lam Research Corporation (NASDAQ:LRCX) with a Buy rating and $300 price target. The bullish stance comes amid expectations that the company is well-positioned to benefit as the wafer fabrication […]

headline: Nasdaq 100 Dips On Hot CPI, Sandisk And Micron Tumble 9%: Stock Market Today

headline: LRCX's Gross Margin Near 50%: More Upside Ahead Amid AI-Led Demand?
summary: Lam Research's non-GAAP gross margin hits 49.9%, and guidance points to 50.5% as AI chip demand boosts revenues, EPS and tool pricing power.
